ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species is usually found */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type (e.g., neuron, glia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type's function */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cell type */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being analyzed */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cell type being analyzed */,
  "median_dNdS" REAL /* Median dN/dS value for the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "median_absolute_deviation" REAL /* Median absolute deviation value */,
  "evolutionary_rate" REAL /* Evolutionary rate calculated for the analysis */,
  "genetic_divergence" REAL /* Genetic divergence value */,
  "quality_control_metric" REAL /* Quality control metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic data being uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the upload */,
  "upload_status" TEXT /* Status of the upload */,
  "upload_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method (e.g., dN/dS analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method used */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* Software used for the analysis */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the experiment results */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment */,
  "protocol_used" TEXT /* Protocol used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., source, version) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value corresponding to the metadata key */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment log commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiment_logs ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
